title: Bauer Professional UV Nail Lamp LED Gel Nail Dryer / 24W Portable Nail Light with 4 Timer Settings/Dual Wavelength USB Powered Curing Lamp for Gel Polish & Nail Art 38699
features: UV NAIL DRYER – Achieve your dream manicure with this sleek UV nail dryer. Measuring just 19.5 x 15.5 x 9cm, it’s perfect for fitting into your beauty station or slipping into your bag for trips. Durable yet lightweight, it’s ideal for home use, sleepovers, or weekends away.

DUAL WAVELENGTH FOR ALL GEL TYPES - Featuring 24 high-performance UV LEDs with dual wavelengths (365nm + 405nm), this lamp ensures even, fast, and thorough curing for all gel polish types - whether you’re creating a glossy shellac manicure, intricate nail art, or a durable builder gel set.

CUSTOMISABLE TIMER SETTING - Choose from 10s, 30s, 60s, or 90s timer options to match your polish and desired results. Whether you're doing a quick refresh or a full glam manicure, the adjustable settings make it easy to achieve long-lasting, chip-resistant nails with a flawless finish.

USB POWERED FOR FLEXIBILITY - Simply plug into any USB power source, be it your laptop, power bank, or wall adapter. With a 5V, 2A input and UV Type 3 technology, it offers safe, efficient power for effortless at-home or on-the-go manicures without the salon price tag.
BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of top-quality hair, beauty & personal care products. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
